ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sensor_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data record */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the sensor reading */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor ID */,
  "layer" INTEGER /* Layer of the sensor reading */,
  "echo" INTEGER /* Echo reading from the sensor */,
  "angle" REAL /* Angle of the sensor reading */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance measured by the sensor */,
  "echo_width" INTEGER /* Width of the echo signal */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data (e.g., valid, invalid, uncertain) */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature reading from the sensor */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity reading from the sensor */,
  "vibration" REAL /* Vibration reading from the sensor */,
  "sensor_uid" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the sensor (e.g., MAC address) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_data_quality FOREIGN KEY ("data_quality") REFERENCES data_quality ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_layer FOREIGN KEY ("layer") REFERENCES sensor_layers ("layer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the sensor */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the sensor */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the sensor */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was installed */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the sensor (e.g., production line, specific machine) */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was last calibrated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the sensor (e.g., active, maintenance, decommissioned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration setting */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor ID */,
  "config_name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration setting */,
  "config_value" TEXT /* Value of the configuration setting */,
  "config_description" TEXT /* Description of the configuration setting */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the configuration became effective */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the configuration expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_configurations_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_layers" (
  "layer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each layer */,
  "layer_name" TEXT /* Name of the layer */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the layer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("layer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality classification */,
  "quality_name" TEXT /* Name of the quality classification */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the quality classification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "anomalies" (
  "anomaly_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each anomaly */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data ID where the anomaly was detected */,
  "anomaly_type" TEXT /* Type of anomaly (e.g., high echo, low distance) */,
  "anomaly_description" TEXT /* Description of the anomaly */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the anomaly (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "recommended_actions" TEXT /* Recommended actions to resolve the anomaly */,
  "detected_date" TEXT /* Date the anomaly was detected */,
  "resolved_date" TEXT /* Date the anomaly was resolved */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the anomaly (e.g., open, resolved, ignored) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("anomaly_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_anomalies_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role ID */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data record being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, modify) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, modify, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor position */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor ID */,
  "production_line" TEXT /* Production line where the sensor is installed */,
  "machine_name" TEXT /* Name of the machine where the sensor is installed */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was last maintained */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_positions_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_lines" (
  "line_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production line */,
  "line_name" TEXT /* Name of the production line */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the production line */,
  "production_capacity" INTEGER /* Production capacity of the line */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_calibration" (
  "calibration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each calibration record */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor ID */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of calibration */,
  "calibration_values" TEXT /* Calibration values */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("calibration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "anomaly_thresholds" (
  "threshold_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each threshold */,
  "anomaly_type" TEXT /* Type of anomaly (e.g., high echo, low distance) */,
  "threshold_value" REAL /* Threshold value for detecting the anomaly */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the threshold */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("threshold_id")
)
